title: ophrys × lidbergii
intro: Ophrys × lidbergii, also known as the Lidberg's bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys tenthredinifera. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Lidberg's bee orchid has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, and is sometimes used to treat conditions like colds and fever. Herbal preparations of Ophrys × lidbergii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
